overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in medieval attire walking through a cobblestone street in a fantasy city at night. The character passes a large domed cathedral with illuminated windows, continues along a fortified curtain wall lined with lanterns, and enters a dark arched gateway guarded by sentries.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic city plaza with domed cathedral

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the cobblestone plaza toward the illuminated domed cathedral

entered.detail: large circular building with tall illuminated arched windows and stone columns
multi-story stone building with arched doorway and overhanging upper floor
wet reflective cobblestone pavement covering the ground

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open cobblestone plaza at night, approaching a large domed cathedral with tall glowing windows. A stone townhouse with warm lantern light stands to the right as the character moves steadily forward through the historic district.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved street alongside fortified curtain wall

events.description: passing the domed cathedral and entering the curved street section alongside the fortified wall

agents.ego_description: continuing along the curved cobblestone path toward the massive fortified wall in the distance

entered.detail: massive stone fortification with crenellated battlements and vertical architectural details
warm orange glowing lanterns mounted on the stone walls

segments.scene_description: Having passed the cathedral, the character walks along a curved cobblestone street flanked by a massive fortified curtain wall on the right. Warm lanterns illuminate the stone architecture as the character approaches a large arched gateway in the distance.

events.description: entering the dark arched gateway from the outdoor street into the enclosed tunnel

agents.ego_description: approaching the large arched entrance and walking into the dark gateway past the guards

notable_agents.action: guard standing motionless by the left side of the entrance archway
guard standing motionless by the right side of the entrance archway

entered.detail: massive stone archway entrance leading into darkness with decorative keystone
rough-hewn stone walls of the interior passage

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the imposing arched gateway flanked by two standing guards and warm lantern light. As the character enters the archway, the scene transitions from the open street into a dark, enclosed stone tunnel with limited visibility ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moonlit fantasy city that transitions from an open historic plaza into a dark, enclosed fortification. It begins with the character walking across a cobblestone plaza toward a large domed cathedral with glowing windows, passing a stone townhouse bathed in warm lantern light. As the character moves past the cathedral, the scene shifts to a curved street flanked by a massive fortified curtain wall, where the lighting remains warm against the stone architecture. The camera then follows the character toward an imposing arched gateway guarded by two sentries before finally passing through the arch and entering a dark, narrow stone tunnel with limited visibility.
